prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程 、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第26名，近年排名稳定在24-27名区间，属全国顶尖综合性大学；2026年高考周期声誉评价为"明显负面" ，主要涉及校园安全事件（前卫校区浴池翻筐事件），13条负面信号集中；抖音热度排名第40位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；2022-2025年声誉记录中多次出现投档线异常 信号，对报考心理有抑制效应；第五轮学科评估A-及以上15个：马克思主义理论A+、考古学A+、法学A、数学A、化学A、物理学A、机械工程A、兽医学A、哲学A- 、工商管理A-、政治学A-、材料科学与工程A-、生物学A-、电子科学与技术A-、计算机科学与技术A-；学科覆盖面广、基础学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电 子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业社会热度持续偏高；2026年四川省普通高考报名约535000人，较2025年（约462767人）增加约15.6%，考生规模大幅增长加剧全省竞争；吉林大学位于吉林省长春市，距四川较远，跨省就读存在地域偏好差异；该校在四川招生占比约2%-4%（2022年196人/全国约840 0人），属中等外省招生规模，无明显本省保护效应。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移趋势、2026年小幅扩招（约2.7%）、四川省考生总数显著增加（+15.6%）、负面 声誉舆情抑制报考意愿等因素，预计2026年理科最低录取位次在2025年基准24083名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约24676名，区间24176-25176名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022: approx. 23044 → 2023: approx. 22694 → 2024: approx. 19766 → 2025: approx. 24083, showing a fluctuating trend over the past four years; 2025 shifted back by approx. 4300 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approx. 24083; planned enrollment for science/physics category from 2021 to 2025: 196 → 180 → 175 → 184, with 2026 planned at 189, a slight expansion of about 2.7% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 26th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 24-27 range in recent years, belonging to a top-tier comprehensive university in China; reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'significantly negative', mainly involving campus safety incidents (the front campus bathhouse basket-turning incident), with 13 concentrated negative signals; Douyin popularity ranked 40th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure; from 2022 to 2025, reputation records show multiple abnormal admission score signals, which have a suppressing effect on application psychology; fifth round discipline evaluation: 15 disciplines rated A- or above: Marxist Theory A+, Archaeology A+, Law A, Mathematics A, Chemistry A, Physics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Veterinary Medicine A, Philosophy A-, Business Administration A-, Political Science A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, Biology A-, Electronic Science and Technology A-, Computer Science and Technology A-; wide disciplinary coverage, strong basic disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to have high social demand; in 2026, the number of regular college entrance examination registrants in Sichuan Province is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (about 462,767), significantly increasing competition across the province; Jilin University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, far from Sichuan, with cross-province study having regional preference differences; the university's enrollment proportion in Sichuan is about 2%-4% (2022: 196 out of about 8,400 nationwide), a moderate out-of-province enrollment scale, with no obvious local protection effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (about 2.7%), a notable increase in the total number of Sichuan candidates (+15.6%), and negative reputation suppressing application willingness, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for science in 2026 will continue to shift back from the 2025 baseline of 24083; predicted minimum ranking is about 24676, with a range of 24176-25176.

Rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 24000) can focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors; rankings near the upper limit (outside 25000) should prioritize Tier 3 safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022 approximately 1502nd place → 2023 approximately 1803rd place → 2024 approximately 9153rd place (abnormal shift) → 2025 approximately 3048th place, with significant fluctuation in 2024 and a clear rebound in 2025, baseline ranking approximately 3048th place; from 2021 to 2025, the planned number of students for liberal arts/history category was 24 → 21 → 28 → 29 respectively, with 2026 planned at 29, unchanged from 2025, no expansion or contraction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 26th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, a top national comprehensive university with profound liberal arts heritage; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is "clearly negative", mainly involving campus safety incidents; Douyin popularity ranking 40th (relatively hot); from 2022 to 2025, there have been multiple abnormal signals in admission scores, which have a suppressive effect on application psychology; liberal arts-related A- and above disciplines: Law A, Archaeology A+, Marxist Theory A+, Philosophy A-, Political Science A-, Business Administration A-; Law and Archaeology are traditionally advantageous disciplines with high social recognition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a relatively high social popularity, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; in 2026, the number of applicants for the Sichuan Province general college entrance examination is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (approximately 462,767), with a significant increase in the number of candidates intensifying competition across the province; Jilin University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, far from Sichuan, with regional preference differences for cross-province study; the number of liberal arts admissions is small (29), a medium-to-small scale out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the clear rebound trend in 2025 rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase in the total number of Sichuan candidates (+15.6%), and negative reputation public opinion, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for liberal arts in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 3048th place; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3078th place, with a range of 2709 to 3447th place.
